owner_operator_stated: Practice passed from Dr. Joseph Gruber III to brothers Dr. Kevin T. Moss (DMD, FAGD) and Dr. Timothy T. Moss (DDS); now operates as Moss Family Dental.
notes: Record entity 'Rex Nicholas DMD' no longer occupies this address/phone. 302 E Countryside Pkwy, Yorkville and (630) 553-7073 now belong to Moss Family Dental (formerly Gruber & Assoc / Gruber & Kostal DDS), owned/operated by Dr. Timothy T. Moss DDS and Dr. Kevin T. Moss DMD FAGD; no mention of Rex Nicholas anywhere on the current site. NPI data shows a Rex Nicholas practicing at a different address in Medinah, IL, consistent with relocation/sale. Vendor hint domain (Johannesbgruber.Eu) was itself a dead lead; the old gruberandassoc.com domain now 301-redirects to mossfamilydentalcare.com. No careers page found.

owner_operator_stated: Site indicates Dr. Susan Mazzei, DDS and Dr. Marco Fajardo are owners/co-founders of West Suburban Oral Health Care; Dr. Ashley Nguyen and Dr. Patel are associate dentists.
notes: Address 380 W Diehl Rd, Naperville and phone (630) 393-3045 confirmed on the practice's own site (matches vendor hint domain exactly). Current 'Meet the Doctors' page lists Mazzei, Fajardo, Nguyen, and Patel; the record's named dentist Kelsey Esposito does NOT appear anywhere on the live page (checked explicitly) even though third-party bio sites say she joined as an associate in 2017 — she may no longer be with the practice, but this is a personnel change, not evidence of a different successor entity at the address. No careers/hiring page found in navigation.

Address 1020 E Ogden Ave Ste 308, Naperville and phone (630) 527-0544 corroborated via search results indexed directly from the practice's own domain (napervilledentalgroup.com/contact-us/naperville-office/). Direct WebFetch of napervilledentalgroup.com returned HTTP 403 on every page tried (bot-blocked, not dead), so roster and hiring-page content could not be directly extracted from the live site. Vendor hint domain (Champerdental.Com) does not match this practice at all — actual site is napervilledentalgroup.com.

Address 720 N Washington St Ste 106, Naperville and phone (630) 420-9090 confirmed on the practice's own site (matches vendor hint domain exactly). Dr. Yousef Paldin, DMD (Midwestern University College of Dental Medicine) has a dedicated bio page on the site; page does not state whether he is owner or associate. 'Meet the Team' link exists but no dedicated careers/hiring page was found.

Vendor hint domain givemeasmiledental.com (and www/http/https variants) returned connection errors on every attempt — the site appears to be down, not merely bot-blocked. Third-party directories (Yelp, WebMD, denTEL) list Dr. Sam Zurich, DDS as the practice's dentist/principal at 535 Fairway Dr Ste 135, Naperville and phone (630) 548-4140, but this could not be corroborated on the practice's own website since it is unreachable, so no roster/hiring facts are claimed here per protocol.

owner_operator_stated: Dr. Reem S. Shafi, DMD (Temple University Kornberg School of Dentistry, 1998) is CEO/owner of Two Rivers Dental, P.C., the group entity operating this Ogden Valley Dental location.
notes: Address 1224 W Ogden Ave Ste B, Naperville and phone (630) 305-6161 confirmed on the practice's own site (matches vendor hint exactly). Site names doctors Reem Shafi, Peterson, and Virji. This location is part of Two Rivers Dental, P.C., a multi-location, multi-specialty dental group (~37 providers across 5 specialty areas per search results) owned/led by Dr. Reem S. Shafi, DMD, CEO — a related brand 'Ogden Dental' (ogdendental.com) also lists Dr. Shafi. Careers page lists multiple current openings across front-office, assistant, and hygienist roles; inquiries route to diane@tworiversdental.com, indicating shared group-level HR.
